name: Urea 46-0-0 (Commercial)
price: FJD 20/bag (subsidized cane) / Commercial price not publicly listed
crops: Sugarcane, corn, vegetable block, root crops, pasture
safety: Hygroscopic; store dry. Apply to moist soil. Do not surface-apply in hot dry conditions (volatilization loss).
notes: Core N source. Subsidy gate FJD 20/bag for registered cane farmers. Non-cane horticulture price requires direct SPFL confirmation.

name: DAP 18-46-0 (Diammonium Phosphate)
price: Subsidized price FJD 20/bag (cane) / Commercial not listed
apprate: Basal at planting, side-dress near root zone
crops: All establishment-stage crops, root crops, sugarcane, fruit trees at planting
safety: High P content. Do not mix with lime at time of application.
notes: Primary establishment fertilizer. Used across Fiji sugarcane + commercial horticulture.

name: MOP 0-0-60 (Muriate of Potash)
apprate: Side-dress at fruit set and bulking
crops: Watermelon, tomato, capsicum, cassava, sweet potato, taro, sugarcane, banana
safety: Chloride-based. Avoid on chloride-sensitive crops (tobacco, some fruits) - use sulphate of potash alternative.
notes: Core K source for fruit set and tuber/root bulking. Critical at STG4-STG6.

name: Sulphate of Ammonia 21-0-0
crops: Sugarcane (primary), brassica crops, alkaline soils needing acidification
safety: Acidifying effect on soil. Good for high-pH soils. Lower N% than urea means higher application volume.
notes: Major sugarcane N source. Also used where soil acidification is beneficial.

name: Agchem Folifert
npk: NPK + Micronutrients (exact ratio not publicly disclosed)
crops: Vegetables, fruits, high-value crops needing foliar feed or stress recovery
safety: Apply evening to avoid leaf burn. Do not mix with oil-based sprays without compatibility test.
notes: Agchem specialist foliar. Exact NPK and micronutrient content requires supplier confirmation.

name: SPFL NPK Compound Blends
crops: Full-season crops needing balanced NPK — horticulture, sugarcane, rice
safety: Check exact NPK ratio per batch. SPFL blends vary.
notes: SPFL blends NPK formulations locally. Specific ratios need direct SPFL inquiry.

name: Black Urea (Humic-Coated)
dosage: 25-30% less than standard urea for same N effect (~70-140 kg/ha)
crops: All N-demanding crops - sugarcane, vegetables, fruits, pasture
safety: Reduces volatilization, leaching, denitrification. Safer for wet tropical soils.
notes: Humic-acid-coated slow-release urea. Reduces application rate 25-30% vs standard urea.

name: Agricultural Lime (Teitei Local)
dosage: 500-2000 kg/ha based on soil pH test
crops: Acid soils, brassica, legumes, solanaceae, taro, all pH-sensitive crops
safety: Allow 2-4 weeks to react with soil before planting. Do not mix with ammonium fertilizer at application.
notes: Locally produced from old corals/limestone. Core pH management input for Taveuni soils.

name: Fishmeal (Teitei)
crops: Organic production - vegetables, fruits, kava, all high-value crops
safety: Strong odour attracts pests if not incorporated. Compost or mix with biochar before surface application.
notes: Core organic N+P source. Essential for biochar priming (Teitei blend).

name: Teitei Biochar Blend
crops: All organic production systems, kava, dalo, vegetables in volcanic soils
safety: Primed biochar - do not apply raw/unprimed biochar (can tie up nutrients initially).
notes: Locally produced biochar + fishmeal + soft rock phosphate + compost blend. Sometimes with seaweed and cow manure. Signature Teitei product.

name: Combined Minerals (Teitei)
crops: Broad vegetable/fruit production, soil remineralization programs
safety: SKU confirmation required - exact mineral content not publicly listed.
notes: Referenced as Teitei product by growers. Exact formulation requires direct contact with Teitei Taveuni.

name: Sofrock / Soft Rock Phosphate
crops: Organic systems, acidic/aluminium soils, kava, dalo, fruit trees, long-cycle crops
safety: Slow-release - do not expect fast response. Best applied 1-2 months before planting.
notes: Pre-digested soft rock phosphate with good P + Ca + silica content. Core input for Teitei biochar priming.

name: SRP Sustain (Blended)
crops: Organic systems, pasture, acidic soils, SSP alternative
safety: Cheaper SSP alternative. Check local Fiji availability before ordering.
notes: Blend of SRP + biology + gypsum + sulphur. Regional availability - may need import through Agchem or direct.

name: Sea & Soil Seaweed Liquid Fertilizer
addnut: Seaweed extract, trace minerals, biostimulants, cytokinins
crops: Kava, dalo, leafy vegetables, fruit trees, stress recovery
safety: Natural product - compatible with organic certification. Avoid midday application.
notes: Fiji-processed seaweed liquid. Excellent for biostimulation and stress recovery.

name: Sea & Soil Biochar
crops: All systems - especially degraded soils, orchards, kava
safety: Prime biochar with compost/fishmeal before use to avoid temporary N tie-up.
notes: Fiji-processed biochar. Long-term soil carbon and microbial habitat amendment.

name: Aggie Global Organic Fertilizer (Fung's Farm)
crops: All organic crops, vegetables, leafy greens, small farms
safety: Organic certified. Good for small-farm producers.
notes: From Fung's Farm via Aggie Global platform. Small-farmer oriented.

name: Redox Organic Fertilizer
crops: Organic production, certified organic farms
safety: Activity level unverified - contact Redox direct to confirm current product range.
notes: Facebook-based visibility only. Direct contact required for current catalog.

name: Urea Fertilizer 20kg (Retail)
crops: Small-farm and home garden urea application for all N-demanding crops
safety: Apply to moist soil. Water in. Do not apply to dry hot surface.
notes: Retail 20kg pack. Convenient for small farms, higher unit cost than 50kg commercial bag.

name: Cocoly Fertilizer 20kg
crops: Full-season horticulture — vegetables, fruits, staging from vegetative through bulking
safety: Water-soluble — can be used for drip irrigation programs.
notes: Water-soluble granular compound. Good maintenance feed. Exact NPK ratio requires pack inspection.

name: Grow More Bromeliad Plant Food 17-8-22
dosage: Per label — typically 1 tsp per gallon water
crops: High-K demand crops — bromeliads, orchids, flowering/fruiting crops needing K push
safety: Low P content. Use alongside P source if P deficiency suspected.
notes: NPK stamped on pack. Retail scale — good for bromeliads, pineapple starter, high-K foliar.

name: Yates Thrive All Purpose Plant Food 500ml
crops: Ornamentals, vegetables, herbs, seedlings, stress recovery
safety: Hobby-garden scale - uneconomic at commercial scale.
notes: Yates standard formulation. Best for small-garden and nursery use.

name: Yates Thrive Vegie & Herbs 500ml
crops: Vegetables, herbs — leafy growth push
safety: N-led formulation. Avoid at flowering stage for fruit crops.
notes: Vegie-specific liquid. Hobby scale.

name: Yates Thrive Tomato Food Concentrate 500ml
crops: Tomato, capsicum, eggplant, chilli — high-K demand at fruiting
safety: Use from flowering onward. Avoid early vegetative stage.
notes: Tomato-specific high-K formulation. Good for fruit set in solanaceae.

name: Yates Thrive Citrus Plant Food 500ml
crops: Citrus trees — orange, lemon, lime, cumquat
safety: Good for small citrus orchards. Commercial scale requires bulk NPK program.
notes: Citrus-specific. Small-scale orchard maintenance.

name: Yates Thrive Orchid Plant Food 500ml
crops: Orchids, vanilla vines, shade crops
safety: Specialty - low volume use.
notes: Orchid/vanilla-specific foliar.

name: Yates Thrive Soluble Fruit & Flower 500g
apprate: Dissolved in water - foliar or drench
crops: Fruiting crops, flowering ornamentals, high-K demand stages
safety: Fast K push for flowering and fruit set.
notes: Soluble powder for fast K boost. Small-scale fruit production.

name: GC Tui Garden Mix 40L
addnut: Blood and bone, gypsum, dolomite, sheep pellets
crops: Seedlings, transplants, potted plants, small garden beds
safety: Ready-to-use media. Not for bulk field application.
notes: Premium potting media with integrated starter fertilizer. Nursery and transplant use.

name: GC Tui Certified Organic Potting Mix 30L
addnut: Bark, pumice, gypsum, sheep dust, blood and bone
crops: Organic seedlings, transplants, certified organic systems
safety: Certified organic. Slower-release nutrient profile than conventional mix.
notes: Certified organic media for organic nursery operations.

name: Aglime (Agricultural Limestone)
crops: Acid soils, brassica, solanaceae, legumes, taro, all pH-sensitive crops
safety: Allow 2-4 weeks to react before planting. Calcium carbonate grade — confirm purity.
notes: Locally produced agricultural lime. Check availability and delivery logistics direct.

name: Pacific Fertiliser Coated Urea (Humic)
crops: All N-demanding crops — pasture, horticulture, sugarcane
safety: Reduces N losses 25-30%. Regional availability — may need import coordination.
notes: Regional Pacific product. Similar to Teitei Black Urea technology. Check Fiji distributor.

name: Pacific Fertiliser Humates with SRP
crops: Soil building programs, organic systems, degraded soils
safety: Long-term soil health investment. Regional product — availability in Fiji varies.
notes: Regional blend. Soil-building product for long-term fertility programs.

name: STG0 LandPrep | STG1 Establishment | STG2 Vegetative | STG3 Pre-Flowering | STG4 Flowering | STG5 Fruit Set | STG6 Development/Bulking | STG7 Maturity | STG8 Harvest | STG9 Post-Harvest / Recovery
SPFL, Agchem — bulk 50kg bags for commercial scale. Real commercial supply chain.
Agchem specialist products — custom blends, foliar, technical advice.
Teitei Taveuni, Sea & Soil, Aggie Global, Redox — organic / sustainable systems.
Vinod Patel, RC Manubhai — hardware chains. Small-farm and hobby scale.
Pacific Fertiliser — regional supplier, may require import coordination.
Product verified via supplier site or published source; formulation known
Product verified but exact NPK/formulation/pricing requires phone confirmation
Supplier/product exists but activity level or current SKU not fully verified
